message:
🐛 Fix tooltip too narrow — use fixed w-72 instead of max-w-xs (#1981)

* 🐛 Fix update-available hint tooltip overflowing right edge of viewport

Add bottom-right placement to FeatureHintTooltip that right-aligns
instead of center-aligning, preventing overflow when the parent element
is near the right edge of the viewport (e.g. UpdateIndicator in navbar).

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Fix tooltip too narrow — use fixed w-72 instead of max-w-xs

The max-w-xs class was being collapsed by the small parent container,
causing the tooltip text to wrap to one word per line. Use w-72 (288px)
fixed width to ensure readable layout.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
